name: Vitello Tonnato
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boneless lean veal (preferably eye of round)
1 can (3.5 oz) oil-packed tuna, well drained
2 Small sweet pickles, drained and coarsely chopped
Black pepper and salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the veal, carrots, celery, onion, and parsley in a large saucepan. Cover with cold water.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours.
3. Cool the veal completely.
4. Puree the tuna, capers, pickles, and anchovies together in a food processor or blender.
5. Add mayonnaise, lemon juice, olive oil, and corn oil; mix until well blended.
6. Season with black pepper and salt to taste.
7. Slice the veal into very thin slices.
8. Arrange on a platter and spoon the tuna sauce over the slices.
9. Ensure the veal is completely covered in sauce.
10. Serve any leftover sauce on the side.
11. Garnish with Italian parsley, lemon slices, and capers.
